title: Anatomy of a Wide Column Store (e.g., Cassandra)
description: A visual breakdown of the core hierarchical data structure and its components in a Column-Based NoSQL system.
relationships: A Table contains many Rows, each identified by a Row Key
Each Row contains one or more Column Families
Each Column Family contains a set of related Columns
Each Column is a key-value pair consisting of a Column Name and a Column Value
A Timestamp is associated with each Column Value for versioning and conflict resolution
